label: V2 Kiosk Audio
info: Dashboard V2 audio control. Publishes Besiter volume commands to /<stationid>/<moduleid>/user/get for every module with payload {"cmd":"volume","data":"<0-100>"}.

name: V2 audio from dashboard command card
info: This flow listens to the existing authenticated dashboard V2 command link, resolves the kiosk/module from Firestore, publishes the Besiter volume command, persists hardware.volume/audio, and sends a dashboard toast. It expects dashboardapi-optimized.json's "new kiosk cmd" link out to include f02a67acb743f201.

name: Prepare V2 audio lookup
Publish Besiter volume
Response wires target the existing dashboard websocket response node
info: The dangling target id 590392fc03398acc is the same dashboard response path used by the V2 bulk command import. If your Node-RED workspace uses a different response node, wire the two response outputs there.
